content: The Eiffel Tower is 324 meters (1,063 feet) tall, including its antenna. When it was completed in 1889, it was the tallest man-made structure in the world at that time.
raw_content: The Eiffel Tower is 324 meters (1,063 feet) tall, including its antenna. When it was completed in 1889, it was the tallest man-made structure in the world at that time.
